STATE OF MISSISSIPPI
COUNTY OP MARION Book 168Sracc 099

WATER LINE EASEMENT

For and in consideration of the sum of One Dollar ($1.00) cash in hand paid, and other good and valuable
considerations, the receipt of which is hereby acknowledged, the undersigned does/do hereby grant, convey,
transfer, and warrant unto BUNKER HILL WATER ASSOCIATION, a perpetual utility easement being twenty
(20) feet in width and as close as practical to the existing road right-of-way, in, on, under, over and across the
jands of the undersigned for the purpose of constructing, maintaining, using, operating, repairing, replacing, or
removing water mains, lines, valves, or other appurtenances thereto, said lands being described as follows:

Marion County 2007 Tax Parce] No. 074-04-000-04-005., PPIN 5397, and located in Section 4,
Township 5 North, Range 18 pes, Marion County, Mississippi.

The undersigned further grant(s) unto Bunker Hill Water Association, the right of ingress and egress over
adjacent lands of the undersigned for the purpose of this easement. There is further granted an additional fifteen
(15) foot temporary construction easement lying adjacent to said water line easement for the purpose of
construction of said water line. Said construction easement shall terminate upon final completion of water line.

The undersigned warrant(s) ownership of the lands above described. :

Witness my/our signature(s), this the / 7 day of 64$7, 2009.
